data.body: AC3 LANDING EVIDENCE: Gerrit change 714 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/714) MERGED on main with LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1, 0 unresolved comments. Contents: calibrate_plan_review_thresholds.py skipped-remainder counter (+ test pin in test_impact_model_versioning.py), the T5e demotion in criteria_routing.json (+ updated pins in test_threshold_recalibration.py and the approved-blocking frozenset), regenerated docs/plan-review-criteria-guide.md, blocking-tier prose updates in docs/plan-review-gate.md and CLAUDE.md, and the durable 'Calibration 3' section in docs/experiments/plan-review-threshold-calibration.md recording the replay table, the pre-registered decision rule, all 11 per-criterion adjudications, the floor-attribution results, and the calibration-4 caution. Preflight before push: make lint + make typecheck green, 6017 tests passed (single failure = the known pre-existing venv-inside-repo resolve-symbol env issue, bug c810, fix in flight as change 710; CI Verified is authoritative and green).
